# alice accepts bob's request, views her network, then bob logs in and views his
1 # Log in as alice
alice
Alice1!
5 # View pending requests
1 # Accept bob's request
7 # View network (bob should appear)
9 # Log out
# Now bob logs in and checks his network
1 # Log in as bob
bob
Bob123!
7 # View network (alice should appear)
9 # Log out
3 # Exit
